title: Very Optimited Plus
description: This is a good Optimized Modpack with many features like Connected Textures and Fresh Animations and Xaeros Minimap and Worldmap
body:
This is a very Optimized Modpack by myself wich has many features like Connected Textures and Fresh Animations. It also includes Journeymap.

There are also some texture packs like whimscape and Colourfull Containers.


This is also my first Modpack :)
